name: §6Frog
description:
§8Foraging Pet

§7Speed: §f[Speed]
§7Fishing Speed: §b[Fishing Speed]
§7Respiration: §3[Respiration]

§6Hunting Enjoyer
§7Increases your chance to catch
§2Forest§7, §bWater§7, and §cCombat §7Shards by
§a10%§7.

§6Hop
§7Grants §680☘ Foraging Fortune §7for
§e20 §7seconds every time you jump.

§6Happy Tree Friends
§7Grants §610☘ Foraging Fortune §7for
§7every other §2Frog Pet §7on the island,
§7up to §b10 §7frogs.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Biome Frog Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to §aFrog
§7pets.

§aThis skin will allow you to swap
§abetween 15 biome themed frogs!

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!

§d§lMYTHIC COSMETIC
